label: Forge production line
summary: The agent-assisted toolchain that produces the case studies. `forge` is the PUBLIC umbrella; 5 private lathes (specchain, blueprint, forge-brand, forge-signal, image-gen) are the underlying tools. Load-bearing for the 'context engineer codified a working practice' positioning.
primary_persona: P1 Reviewer assessing whether the production-line claim has verifiable receipts
